query.query_string: Perindopril AND malignant hypertensive renal disease

data.query: Perindopril AND malignant hypertensive renal disease

results.title: [Functional state of a solitary kidney after nephrectomy for renal cancer].
results.abstract: The outcome of surgical treatment of renal cancer depends not only on cancer-specific survival, but also on the degree of loss of renal function, which often develops after surgery, especially radical nephrectomy.
